mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan t WHERE COALESCE(t.is_approved, 0) = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan WHERE COALESCE(is_approved, 0) = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan t WHERE t.plan_year = #{planYear} AND COALESCE(t.is_approved, 0) = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan WHERE plan_year = #{planYear} AND COALESCE(is_approved, 0) = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_annual_plan (plan_year, plan_name, description, status, priority, remarks, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, plan_approver_user_id, plan_approver_team, plan_approver_position, plan_approver_name, completion_approver_user_id, completion_approver_team, completion_approver_position, completion_approver_name, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{planYear}, #{planName}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planApproverTeam}, #{planApproverPosition}, #{planApproverName}, #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{completionApproverTeam}, #{completionApproverPosition}, #{completionApproverName}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_annual_plan SET plan_year = #{planYear}, plan_name = #{planName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, plan_approver_user_id = #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_approver_team = #{planApproverTeam}, plan_approver_position = #{planApproverPosition}, plan_approver_name = #{planApproverName}, completion_approver_user_id = #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, completion_approver_team = #{completionApproverTeam}, completion_approver_position = #{completionApproverPosition}, completion_approver_name = #{completionApproverName}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ehs_annual_plan t WHERE t.plan_year = #{planYear} AND t.is_approved = 1 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_annual_plan SET status = #{status}, is_approved = #{approved}, plan_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE plan_approved_at END, plan_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE plan_approved_by END, completion_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE completion_approved_at END, completion_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE completion_approved_by END, reject_reason = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DRAFT' AND #{rejectReason} IS NOT NULL THEN #{rejectReason} ELSE reject_reason END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
